title: The Sword of Monte Cristo
writer: Alexandre Dumas, Maurice Geraghty, Edward L. Alperson
actors: George Montgomery, Paula Corday, Berry Kroeger
plot: In 1858 France, Emperor Louis Napoleon sends Captain Renault of the Royal Dragoons, Minister La Roche and Major Nicolet to Normandy in search of the members of a group of rebels. A Masked Cavalier - Lady Christianne, niece of the ...
